ValidationRule.description: Rate Pay Code should not be updated for Executed Contract.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( Preventive_Care_Agreement__r.ContractPaymentAgreement.Contract.RecordType_DeveloperName__c = "Client", ISPICKVAL( Preventive_Care_Agreement__r.ContractPaymentAgreement.Contract.Status, "Executed") , OR( ISCHANGED( Pay_Code__c ) , ISNEW() ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Rate Pay Code should not be updated for Executed Contract.
